2266.one_line_summary: Atomic swap-based American call options using HTLCs for token exchange.
2266.notes: Tokenized financial derivative with HTLC mechanics; domain-specific use case for DeFi.

2304.one_line_summary: Multi-chain address resolution for ENS supporting arbitrary blockchains.
2304.notes: Extends ENS naming with cross-chain address support; identity/naming infrastructure.

2309.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for batch transfer/mint events via consecutive token ranges.
2309.notes: Scalability extension for NFTs; enables minting/transferring millions of tokens efficiently.

2333.one_line_summary: BLS12-381 key derivation from entropy seed using hierarchical tree structure.
2333.notes: Cryptographic key management standard; includes post-quantum backup via Lamport signatures.

2334.notes: Companion to ERC-2333; defines key path derivation for hierarchical organization.

2335.one_line_summary: BLS12-381 keystore JSON format with encryption, verification, and decryption modules.
2335.notes: Secure key storage standard; third part of BLS12-381 key management suite.

2386.one_line_summary: Hierarchical deterministic walletstore JSON format for Ethereum 2 key management.
2386.notes: Wallet-level storage extending ERC-2334/2335 keystores with HD wallet metadata.

2390.one_line_summary: Geographic split-horizon DNS for ENS using geohash-based location-aware resolution.
2390.notes: Extends ENS with geo-proximal awareness via sparse quadtree; enables geographic routing.

2400.one_line_summary: URI format for submitted transactions with metadata for decoding and validation.
2400.notes: Transaction receipt interchange format; includes method signature and events for UX.

2470.one_line_summary: Singleton factory enabling deterministic contract deployment via CREATE2 across chains.
2470.notes: Keyless deployment using Nick's method; ensures same address on any EVM chain.

2477.one_line_summary: Token metadata integrity verification via cryptographic hashes (ERC-721/1155).
2477.notes: Web3 counterpart to W3C SRI; enables immutability verification of off-chain metadata.

2494.one_line_summary: Baby Jubjub twisted Edwards elliptic curve for cryptography within zk-SNARK circuits.
2494.notes: Cryptographic primitive for ZKPs; enables EdDSA and Pedersen hashing in circuits.

2520.one_line_summary: Multiple contenthash records per ENS name supporting different distributed hosting systems.
2520.notes: Extends ERC-1577 to enable multi-protocol hosting (IPFS, Swarm, Onion, ZeroNet).

2525.one_line_summary: ENS-based login system using metadata-stored wallet provider instantiation code.
2525.notes: Decentralized wallet discovery via ENS; enables seamless multi-wallet DApp support.

2535.one_line_summary: Diamonds: modular proxy pattern for unlimited contract functionality via facets.
2535.notes: Solves 24KB contract size limit; enables atomic multi-function upgrades via delegatecall.
